calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JAN-04-2017: 9:00 A.M.: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE IN DEPT. 525 FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL WITH THE COURT, BOTH PARTIES APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA AND WITH COURT STAFF PRESENT.

THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO THE PARTIES AND THE WITNESS PRIOR TO TESTIMONY; THEREUPON, THE COURT HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE THAT IS INTRODUCED BY MS. YAN CHEN, MANAGER OF GRACE JEWELRY, AND ALSO MS. DIANA TANG, BOTH APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY. THE COURT ALSO ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF MR. MOHAMMED AKRAM UNTIL 9:36 A.M.

AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER REVIEWING PELIMINARILY THE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT THEN TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MICHELLE BRANT; CLERK MARJOIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Judgment Entered
